final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand color + secondary color + typography guideline sheet for "染秋 (RAN QIU)".

Style/medium: needs an "国风" (Chinese aesthetic) brand guideline aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include three distinct sections: primary color swatch, secondary color swatch, typography specimen
Subject: must include "染秋" brand name and "RAN QIU" romanization
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a warm autumn direction inspired by osmanthus, persimmon, maple leaves, oolong tea — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" (primary Chinese logotype), "RAN QIU" (romanization), "桂花乌龙" / "琥珀枫叶" / "柿霜暮色" (product line names)
Constraints: must preserve all three color swatch sections clearly labeled, typography hierarchy visible
Avoid:
